name: Lobber
developer: Jaden Servant, Ryan Pratt, Michael Roskuski, Mike West, Anthony Gatturna
short_description: LOBBER is a top down hack and slash where you can hack, slash, and chop your way to victory! Cut off skeleton's heads and catch their skulls to perform powerful moves!
detailed_description:
LOBBER is a top down hack and slash where you can hack, slash, and chop your way to victory! Cut off skeleton's heads and catch their skulls to perform powerful moves!

  • Endless arcade action with 3 unique enemy types
  • 2 different objectives to clear, alternating each level
  • Wide and varied moveset with melee, ranged, and special options
about_the_game:
